action.reasoning: Observation: the last attempt failed due to stale CLI flags; train.py now expects --sampler weighted and --loss cb_ce. Analysis: the best hidden score came from the calibrated decoupled stage-2 recipe, and the cheapest plausible recovery is to rerun stage 2 from the original checkpoints/stage1.pt with the corrected flags, preserving output under a fresh immutable path. Since this is classifier-only retraining, it is fast and worth one more measured eval. Decision: inspect train.py arguments briefly, run corrected stage-2 training from checkpoints/stage1.pt, smoke-test predict locally on val, and submit the fresh checkpoint.
action.command: python train.py --help && python train.py --data_dir /data --epochs 8 --batch_size 128 --lr 0.003 --weight_decay 0.05 --img_size 224 --num_workers 4 --model_name convnext_tiny.fb_in22k_ft_in1k --dropout 0.3 --sampler weighted --loss cb_ce --freeze_backbone --resume checkpoints/stage1.pt --save_path checkpoints/origstage1_stage2.pt --calibrate && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/origstage1_stage2.pt --output pred_smoke.json --report_val
